design_philosophy: Bright and clean. White base with green details and blue accents for clarity. Style: minimal, modern, calm. Lots of white space. Icons simple (line style). Positioning around CLARITY, FLOW, MENTAL RELIEF.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-light text-slate-900

components_to_use.navigation: Sticky header with backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, clear logo, Language Switcher (EN/ES/PT-BR) as a dropdown, and primary CTA button. Desktop nav visible.
components_to_use.hero: Split layout or stacked with a dramatic interactive 'Before/After' image slider (react-compare-slider or similar). Large H1.
components_to_use.value_props: Minimalist grid or flex layout. Generous white space (p-8 or p-12 per card). Use lucide-react icons in Emerald/Blue.
components_to_use.how_it_works: 3-step process using numbers or timeline. High contrast steps.
components_to_use.packages_pricing: 3 columns. Standard package featured with a subtle Emerald border or shadow.
components_to_use.before_after_gallery: Grid of cards showing before/after transformations. Use image pairs.
components_to_use.intake_form: Multi-step wizard (Shadcn Tabs or custom state) for 'Show us your space', 'Questions', 'Upload photos'.
components_to_use.admin_panel: Simple dashboard layout. Sidebar navigation. Data table for form submissions. Form to upload new Before/After images.

interactive_elements.buttons: Rounded-full or soft rounded-xl. Primary CTA bg-emerald-500 text-white hover:bg-emerald-600. Secondary buttons outline or subtle bg-slate-100.
interactive_elements.transitions: Smooth transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease. Hover lift on cards (-translate-y-1).
interactive_elements.language_switcher: Shadcn DropdownMenu or Select for EN, ES, PT-BR.

testing.required_attributes: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements, e.g., data-testid='cta-start-project', data-testid='lang-switcher', data-testid='intake-next-step'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: lucide-react, framer-motion, react-compare-slider.
Set up Tailwind config with 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts.
Implement a language context or simple dictionary object to handle Trilingual content (EN, ES, PT-BR).
Build a 'react-compare-slider' for the Hero and Before/After gallery to show the transformations interactively.
Create the multi-step intake form with Shadcn components (Input, Textarea, Button).
Create a mock Admin Panel route ('/admin') with Shadcn Table to list leads and a form to add new before/after images.
